title: angelica morii
intro: Angelica morii, also known as Morio, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Angelica morii include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms of PMS, and lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Angelica morii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas, to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
